name: Reborn with big size
description:
Reborn in new life

Some things that help you to get better experiences/response while chatting with bots are:

  • Making long messages - This can help the bot not to talk for you, if you make more detailed messages where you describe your persona or the things you're thinking or doing the bot will not talk for you. It may work sometimes

  • Something that help you is using this method (OOC:) - The OOC is for when you want to say something out of the roleplay, you can ask for the bot to talk from the POV of the character and not from you. it could benefit or not

  • Adjusting the temp and the token count - I know how to explain this you need adjust values basically because it will make bots logic higher or lower

  • Deleting messages - You can edit the message of the bot where is speaking for you so the next response doesn't talk for you OR you can easily delete the message and make a new response

Now, the tips I show you may not work and if it did not work its the JLLM fault Thank me later I got bit of inspiration from making this but did not copy word for word made it my own

Your gonna be reborn as new you
creator: Miyu_Ji
